assertions.description: INCORRECT: The gerber analyzer reports aligned=false with issue 'Width varies by 17.6mm across copper/edge layers'. The Edge.Cuts is 40.3mm wide while B.Cu is only 22.7mm wide. For a Eurorack front panel, the back copper layer typically only has pads for mounting hardware on one side (not spanning the full board width), making this width variation legitimate and expected — not an actual misalignment. The analyzer's heuristic incorrectly treats asymmetric feature placement as a coordinate misalignment.
